description: sync workflow_reference, child sets var, parent reads it
yaml:
collection: "FSRPB Render Path Probe"
description: "render-path probe collection"
playbooks:
  - name: "rp_ref_sync_child"
    description: "child for rp_ref_sync_parent"
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - name: "ChildStart"
        type: start
        next: "Compute"
      - name: "Compute"
        type: set_variable
        vars:
          product: 42
          child_marker: "ran"
  - name: "rp_ref_sync_parent"
    description: "parent calls child sync, reads vars.steps.<ref>"
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - name: "Trigger"
        type: start
        next: "Call"
      - name: "Call"
        type: workflow_reference
        arguments:
          target: rp_ref_sync_child
          apply_async: false
          pass_parent_env: false
          pass_input_record: false
        next: "Capture"
      - name: "Capture"
        type: set_variable
        vars:
          child_product: "{{ vars.steps.Call.product }}"
          child_seen:    "{{ vars.steps.Call }}"
